<|14.94|> But what you could and probably should do<|17.62|>

<|22.08|> but the meaning of it.<|25.90|>
<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> For you too, you too are sealed by the Holy Spirit and marked as Christ's own.<|8.30|>
